responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! Welcome to ShopNest.
Hey! Ask me anything about products, orders, or delivery.
Orders are usually delivered within 3–5 business days.
You can track your delivery from the My Orders page.
Delivery time depends on your location and product availability.
You can return products within 7 days of delivery.
Refunds are processed within 3–5 working days after return approval.
Returned products must be unused and in original condition.
We support online payments via Razorpay.
All payments are secure and encrypted.
You can pay using UPI, cards, or net banking.
Yes, Cash on Delivery is available for selected locations.
You can choose Cash on Delivery during checkout.
We sell laptops, mobiles, earphones, and electronic accessories.
ShopNest offers a wide range of electronic products.
You can explore all laptops in the Shop section.
We offer laptops suitable for students, professionals, and gamers.
We offer the latest smartphones at competitive prices.
Explore all mobiles from the Shop page.
We have wired and wireless earphones available.
Explore earphones and audio accessories in the Shop section.
You can view your orders in the My Orders section.
Order details and tracking are available after login.
You need to log in to place orders and track them.
You can sign up easily using your email address.
Admins can manage products, users, orders, and analytics.
The admin dashboard provides sales and revenue insights.
Your data is secured using JWT authentication and encryption.
We follow best security practices to protect user information.
You're welcome! Happy shopping with ShopNest.
